name: Nintendo 64
description: Nintendo's 64-bit home console platform, built around cartridge-based 3D games, four-player local multiplayer, and analog control.

eras.title: 3D Foundation Era
eras.description: Launch and early period defining analog 3D movement, local multiplayer, and Nintendo's transition from 2D to 3D.

eras.title: Late Cartridge Era
eras.description: Late period of refined first-party games, Rare output, and ambitious cartridge releases.
